name: canopy-plugin-typescript
description: TypeScript implementation of the Canopy blockchain plugin

scripts.build: npm run build:proto && npm run build:descriptors && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run copy:proto
scripts.copy:proto: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/proto',{recursive:true}); for (const file of ['index.js','index.cjs','index.d.ts','descriptors.ts']) { const src = `src/proto/${file}`; const dest = `dist/proto/${file.replace(/\.ts$/, '.js')}`; if (fs.existsSync(src)) fs.copyFileSync(src, dest); }"
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/contract/game2048-replay.test.js dist/contract/game2048-contract.test.js
scripts.build:proto: pbjs -t static-module -w commonjs -o src/proto/index.js proto/*.proto && pbts -o src/proto/index.d.ts src/proto/index.js && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/proto/index.js','src/proto/index.cjs')"
